ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., RB, WR, TE) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player for the week */,
  "rec" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "tgt" INTEGER /* Number of targets */,
  "recyds" INTEGER /* Receiving yards */,
  "y_r" REAL /* Yards per reception */,
  "lg" INTEGER /* Longest reception */,
  "twenty_plus" INTEGER /* Number of receptions over 20 yards */,
  "rectd" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns */,
  "att" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushyds" INTEGER /* Rushing yards */,
  "rushtd" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns */,
  "fl" INTEGER /* Fumbles lost */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "fpts" REAL /* Total fantasy points */,
  "fpts_per_game" REAL /* Fantasy points per game */,
  "roster_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of leagues where the player is owned */,
  "two_point_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of two-point conversions */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns (receiving + rushing) */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in fantasy (e.g., RB, WR, TE) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player faced in the given week */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., clear, rain, snow) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, questionable, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commissioner (manager) of the league */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the league was created */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., standard, PPR, dynasty) */,
  "scoring_settings" TEXT /* JSON object containing scoring settings (e.g., points per reception, points per touchdown) */,
  "draft_type" TEXT /* Type of draft (e.g., snake, auction) */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "waiver_wire_type" TEXT /* Type of waiver wire (e.g., free agent, bid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the team */,
  "current_standings" INTEGER /* Current standings of the team in the league */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "acquired_date" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, on waiver wire) */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., draft, trade, free agency) */,
  "acquisition_cost" TEXT /* Cost of acquisition (e.g., draft pick, trade assets) */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the player was dropped from the roster */,
  "drop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping the player (e.g., performance, injury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roster_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
